page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an Arm-based compute-optimized server instance powered by the custom Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyper-threading is disabled. The hardware configuration includes 128 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core. The processor is equipped with 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core capabilities and memory performance. The multi-core stress-ng CPU benchmark is rated as strong, and the multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance reaches top-tier levels. Memory bandwidth for cached small blocks is strong, and the PassMark memory score is positioned in the top tier. Database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput all demonstrate strong performance. However, single-core performance in stress-ng and uncached large-block memory bandwidth remain in the average tier.

The Arm64 architecture of the YiTian710 processor offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded workloads compared to traditional x86 architectures. Tradeoffs include the lack of local storage, which requires network-attached storage configurations, and a relatively low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2 GB per core. Additionally, workloads requiring x86-specific instruction sets or high single-core performance may not benefit from this architecture. This instance is suited for multi-threaded applications, web serving, database operations, and parallelized data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an Arm-based compute-optimized server instance powered by the 64-core Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 128 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core, with hyper-threading disabled. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show strong multi-core CPU performance, top-tier multi-threaded decompression, and strong database and static web serving throughput, though single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth are average. This instance provides qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized workloads, making it suitable for multi-threaded applications, web serving, and database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an Arm64 compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is an Arm64 compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An Arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated cores and high multi-threaded performance for parallel workloads and web serving.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-core Alibaba YiTian710 Arm64 processor running at 2.75 GHz
Equipped with 128 GB of RAM, providing a compute-optimized 2.0 GB per core
Delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and top-tier multi-threaded decompression
Features 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and static web serving
